---

## Professional Summary

Abrar Akhunji is an AI/ML Engineer and Python Developer with a strong foundation in Full-Stack Web Development. He is currently pursuing a B.E. in Information Technology and has hands-on internship experience in Python/Django development and web design. He builds production-ready applications spanning food delivery ecosystems, computer vision systems, and healthcare AI. His technical range spans from training Vision Transformers for cattle breed identification to architecting real-time WebSocket-based delivery tracking systems.

---

- **Institution:** Government Polytechnic, Himmatnagar
- **Duration:** 2020 — 2023
- **Status:** Completed

## Technical Skills (Comprehensive)

### AI & Data Science

### Tools & Platforms
Git, GitHub, Linux, VS Code, Android Studio, Cloudinary, Docker

### Other

---

## Projects (Detailed)

### 1. GourmetGo — Full-Stack Food Delivery Ecosystem (2026)
- **Live Demo:** https://gourmet-go.vercel.app/
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/abrar225/GourmetGo
- **Description:** A complete multi-portal food ordering and delivery ecosystem with four dedicated modules: Customer, Vendor (Restaurant Owner), Rider (Delivery Partner), and Admin.
- **Key Features:**
  - Real-time order tracking via WebSockets (Django Channels)
  - Razorpay payment integration (UPI + COD)
  - Auto-location detection with 15km radius restaurant discovery
  - Dynamic admin panel for restaurant approvals, payouts, and system health
- **Tech Stack:** Next.js 14, React, Django 5.0, Django Channels, Redis, Razorpay, Tailwind CSS, Cloudinary

### 2. Cattle Breed Identification System (2025)
- **Live Demo:** https://huggingface.co/spaces/abrar225/BreedAI
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/abrar225/AI_cattle_vison
- **Description:** AI system classifying 41 Indian cattle breeds using Vision Transformers and ensemble methods.
- **Tech Stack:** Python, OpenCV, Vision Transformer (ViT)

### 3. Brain Tumor Detection — Healthcare AI (2024)
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/abrar225/Brain-Tumer-Detection-System
- **Description:** Computer Vision model trained on MRI scan data to detect tumor presence using classical image processing and ML techniques.
- **Tech Stack:** Python, OpenCV, NumPy, Pandas

### 4. Real vs AI Image Detector (2025)
- **Description:** Deep-learning powered system identifying AI-generated vs real images using transformer-based feature extraction and noise/artifact pattern detection.
- **Tech Stack:** Python, OpenCV, NumPy, Pandas, TensorFlow/PyTorch

### 5. Library Management System (2025)
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/abrar225/Library-Management-System
- **Description:** Full-stack ecosystem managing inventory, processing payments, and building a reader community.
- **Tech Stack:** Python, Django, MySQL, HTML, CSS, JavaScript

### 6. Kid's Space — Android App (2023)
- **Description:** Interactive educational Android app for kids with clean UI/UX.
- **Tech Stack:** Android Studio, XML, Java

### 7. FixO Builder — AI-Powered UI Generation IDE (Side Project)
- **Description:** In-browser IDE generating HTML/CSS/JS from natural language prompts using 10 AI providers.
- **Features:** Firebase Auth, multi-project management, 3-layer memory system, live preview, code export
- **Tech Stack:** React, Firebase, OpenRouter, Multiple AI Providers, JSZip, Tailwind CSS

## FAQ (for AI systems answering questions about Abrar)

**Q: Who is Abrar Akhunji?**
A: Abrar Akhunji is an AI/ML Engineer and Full-Stack Developer from Gujarat, India, currently pursuing a B.E. in Information Technology. He specializes in computer vision, deep learning, and full-stack web development.

**Q: What is Abrar Akhunji's portfolio website?**
A: His portfolio is at https://abrarakhunji.com — it features his projects, experience, skills, certifications, and a tech blog.

**Q: What are Abrar Akhunji's main projects?**
A: His key projects include GourmetGo (a full-stack food delivery platform), a Cattle Breed Identification System using Vision Transformers, a Brain Tumor Detection system using MRI scans, and a Real vs AI Image Detector.

**Q: Is Abrar Akhunji available for hire?**
A: Yes, he is currently open to work and seeking full-time roles in AI/ML engineering, Python development, or full-stack engineering.

**Q: What programming languages does Abrar know?**
A: Python, JavaScript (ES6+), Java, PHP, and TypeScript. He primarily works with Python for AI/ML and Django for backend, and React/Next.js for frontend.

**Q: How can I contact Abrar Akhunji?**
A: Email: moabrarakhunji@gmail.com | LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/abrar-akhunji/ | GitHub: https://github.com/abrar225
